header.subtitle: Application for staff positions
header.intro: Thanks for your interest in working with one of our local clubs. This form takes about 10–15 minutes. You can save your progress and continue later.

1.title: Eligibility
1.description: Before we start with the actual questions, we need to verify a few legal requirements. If any of these don't apply, we unfortunately cannot hire you.
1.verein_label: Which local club are you applying to?
1.volljaehrig: I am at least 18 years old
1.wohnsitz: I have lived in Germany for at least 6 months
1.mitglied_label: Are you a member of this club?
1.mitglied_ja: Yes, I am already a member
1.mitglied_wird: No, but I will become a member
1.mitglied_nein: No, and I won't become a member
1.nicht_eu: I am not an EU citizen
1.arbeitserlaubnis: I have a valid residence and work permit for Germany
1.blocker_age: Employment at a Cannabis Social Club requires a minimum age of 18 (KCanG / Cannabis Consumption Act).
1.blocker_wohnsitz: Under the KCanG, residence in Germany for at least 6 months is mandatory.
1.blocker_mitglied: Membership in the club is required for employment at a CSC under §17 KCanG. Without membership, we unfortunately cannot hire you. If you'd like to reconsider: you can sign up directly here — then come back and continue your application.

2.title: Personal information
2.description: Required fields are marked with *. Tax ID, social security number, IBAN, and health insurance are optional — providing them now speeds up the contract process later.
2.optional_hint: These are voluntary and only needed for the contract process if hired.

3.title: Role and motivation
3.description: Choose one or more roles you'd like to apply for. Some roles require additional information.
3.rollen_label: Which role(s) are you applying for?
3.rolle_ausgabe_desc: Direct member contact at the counter
3.rolle_head_grower_desc: Technical lead of the grow team, strain selection, quality assurance, planning. No direct plant work. Part-time or full-time possible.
3.rolle_vorstand_desc: Legal & organizational responsibility, external representation. Starts as volunteer, mini-job possible once dispensing begins.
3.rolle_stellv_desc: Stand-in for the board. Starts as volunteer, mini-job possible later.
3.praevention_label: Do you hold the qualification certificate per KCanG?
3.praevention_wird: No, but I'm willing to obtain it
3.sicherheit_label: Which §34a GewO certificate do you hold?
3.sicherheit_wird: No, but I'm willing to obtain it
3.motivation_label: Brief motivation: Why this role, why our club?
3.motivation_placeholder: A few lines — what attracts you to this role?
3.standort_konflikt_text: You've selected roles from two different locations — cultivation facility AND dispensing point. These are separate venues, often geographically distant. Typically, one person works at one location only. This isn't impossible, but it's unusual.
3.standort_konflikt_bestaetigung: I understand that cultivation and dispensing are different locations. I'd still like to apply for both areas — the board can decide what fits.

4.title: Qualifications and experience
4.description: We want to understand what you bring — both professionally and personally.
4.vorerfahrung_placeholder: Relevant work experience, volunteer work, cannabis-specific experience…
4.sprachen_hint: German is required. Additional languages help with member communication.
4.anhaenge_hint: CV and possibly certificates, qualification proofs. Up to 10 files at 10 MB each. Allowed: PDF, JPG, PNG, HEIC.
4.anhaenge_kein_upload: I'm not uploading any documents now
4.anhaenge_kein_upload_bestaetigung: I understand that I'll need to submit documents (e.g. CV, qualification certificates) later. Without documents, the board cannot finalize my application.

5.title: Availability
5.description: When can you work? Click the time slots when you're generally available.
5.matrix_hint: Not a contract — we read this as rough availability. Specific shifts will be agreed later.
5.matrix_hint_anbau: When could you work at the cultivation facility? Shifts there often follow plant phases (day/night cycles) and may include early mornings or weekends.
5.matrix_hint_ausgabe: When could you work at the dispensing point? Shifts follow member opening hours (often afternoon to evening, including Saturdays).
5.matrix_hint_allgemein: When are you generally available for your selected activities?
5.stunden_hint: Note: Most CSC roles are structured as mini-jobs (KCanG requirement). That's about 10 hrs/week at minimum wage.
5.bereit_feiertag: I'm willing to work public holidays
5.bereit_nacht: I'm willing to work evenings/nights (after 8 pm)
5.kuendigungsfrist_placeholder: e.g. 4 weeks to end of month, immediate, …
5.sperrzeiten_label: Planned absences in the next 6 months (optional)
5.probearbeit_intro: Before a final hire, a trial period is standard. It helps you AND us assess whether the role really fits.
5.probearbeit_label: Are you willing to do trial work?
5.probearbeit_ja: Yes, I'm willing to do trial work
5.probearbeit_nein: No, I'm not willing to do trial work
5.probearbeit_orte_label: Where would you be willing to do trial work?
5.probearbeit_ort_eigener: At the location of my application club
5.probearbeit_ort_eigener_desc: At the club you're applying to
5.probearbeit_ort_andere: Also at other locations across Germany
5.probearbeit_ort_andere_desc: Trial work at other Mariana Cannabis clubs (trial only, no cover work)
5.probearbeit_dauer_label: How many days of trial work would you consider?
5.probearbeit_reisekosten_text: For trial work outside your application club (e.g. in Göttingen), we cover travel expenses against receipts up to €100 per trial session (2nd class train ticket, accommodation if needed). Details to be agreed before the trial work.

6.title: Employment type
6.description: Which type fits you? Multiple selections possible.
6.info_verguetung: Compensation is fixed per role. You don't need to specify a desired salary.
6.info_probezeit: Probation period is uniformly 6 months for all employment relationships.

7.title: Mobility
7.description: How will you get to the club, and how far are you willing to travel?
7.anfahrt_label: Maximum commute to the dispensing point
7.anfahrt_label_anbau: Maximum distance to the cultivation facility
7.anfahrt_hint_ausgabe: How long are you willing to commute to your club location?
7.anfahrt_hint_anbau: Cultivation facilities are often further away — sometimes 400+ km. Be honest about what's feasible.
7.fahrzeug_label: Do you have your own vehicle available?
7.jobticket_label: Would a public transport pass (Deutschland-Ticket subsidy) be relevant for you?
7.jobticket_hint: We can offer qualified employees a public transport subsidy — it eases your finances and is eco-friendly.

8.title: Optional information
8.description: This section is entirely voluntary. Refusing has no impact on your application. The information helps us assign you well — it's helpful but not a selection criterion.
8.rechtshinweis: These details fall under Art. 9 GDPR (special categories of personal data). We process them only with your explicit consent. You can withdraw consent at any time.
8.einwilligung_label: I consent to the processing of the following voluntary information
8.sucht_hint: We do NOT ask about cannabis consumption — that would be discriminatory toward CSC members. We only ask about addiction history that may be relevant to job safety.
8.sucht_label: Do you have any addiction history that may be relevant to this role?
8.schwerbehinderung_hint: A recognized disability does NOT negatively impact your application. We ask so we can adapt the workplace and tasks if needed — and to check that the role really suits you (e.g. physically demanding cultivation work).
8.schwerbehinderung_label: Do you have a recognized disability or equivalent status?
8.schwerbehinderung_gdb_hint: From GdB 50 on, special legal protections apply.
8.schwerbehinderung_einschr_label: Do you have any physical, sensory, or cognitive restrictions that may be relevant to the role?
8.schwerbehinderung_einschr_hint: So we can check whether the role fits you or whether we can adapt the workplace.
8.schwerbehinderung_einschr_placeholder: e.g. limited lifting capacity, visual impairment, hearing impairment, mobility restriction, …
8.schwerbehinderung_anpassungen_placeholde: e.g. ergonomic workstation, height-adjustable desk, lighter physical work, flexible breaks, …

9.title: Privacy and submission
9.description: Final step — read the privacy notice and provide consent.
9.verantwortlicher_text: Mariana Cannabis (parent organization), address pending board resolution. The respective local club may have additional joint-controller arrangements.
9.zweck_text: Application and selection process for employment with one of our local clubs.
9.rechtsgrundlage_text: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (pre-contractual measures). For voluntary data (Section 8): Art. 9(2)(a) GDPR (explicit consent).
9.speicherdauer_text: If hired: kept in personnel file (statutory retention 6–10 years). If not hired: automatic deletion 6 months after decision (AGG period).
9.rechte_text: Right of access, rectification, erasure, data portability, restriction of processing, objection, and complaint to the supervisory authority.
9.dsgvo_einwilligung_label: I have read the privacy notice and consent to the processing of my data under the conditions stated above (required).
9.wahrheit_label: I confirm that my information is truthful (required).
9.captcha_hint: Please solve the captcha to confirm you're not a bot.

validation.phone_invalid: Please enter a valid phone number
validation.age_under_18: You must be at least 18 years old. Employment at a CSC requires a minimum age of 18 (KCanG).
validation.age_over_100: Please enter a realistic date of birth.
validation.plz_invalid: Please enter a valid postal code (5 digits)
validation.adresse_unklar: ⚠ Address could not be uniquely identified — please verify, you can still continue
validation.adresse_nicht_gefunden: Address not found — please verify your input, you can still continue
validation.captcha_required: Please solve the captcha to continue
validation.min_one_role: Please select at least one role
validation.min_one_anstellung: Please select at least one employment type
validation.min_one_slot: Please select at least one time slot
validation.min_one_slot_anbau: Please select at least one time slot for the cultivation facility
validation.min_one_slot_ausgabe: Please select at least one time slot for the dispensing point
validation.standort_konflikt_required: Please confirm that you're aware of the location separation
validation.min_one_probearbeit_ort: Please select at least one location for trial work
validation.probearbeit_required: Please indicate whether you're willing to do trial work
validation.praevention_required: Please indicate whether you have the qualification certificate
validation.fix_errors: Please fix the highlighted fields before continuing.
validation.stunden_invalid: Maximum must be greater than or equal to minimum

success.intro: Thanks for your application. We've received it and will get back to you within 7 days.
success.schritt_1: We'll send you a confirmation email shortly.
success.schritt_2: The relevant club's board will review your application.
success.schritt_3: We'll respond with an interview invitation or a decision.
success.self_service_text: Use the link in the confirmation email to view your application status anytime.

errors.submit_failed: Something went wrong while submitting. Please try again or write us an email.
errors.no_vereine: No clubs are currently accepting applications. Please contact us directly.
errors.load_failed: Could not load data. Please reload the page.
